Package global.thalion.ttio.protocols

Interface Provenanceable

All Known Implementing Classes:
AcquisitionRun
public interface Provenanceable
Objects implementing Provenanceable carry a W3C PROV-compatible chain of processing records. Every transformation applied to the data contributes an entry; the chain makes the object self-documenting and supports regulatory audit trails.

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOProvenanceable, Python ttio.protocols.Provenanceable.

Since:
0.6

    • addProcessingStep

      void addProcessingStep(ProvenanceRecord step)

      Returns:

    • inputEntities

      List<String> inputEntities()
      Returns:
      distinct input entity identifiers referenced by the chain.

    • outputEntities

      Returns:
      distinct output entity identifiers referenced by the chain.
